languages.text: "Я бы сказал{mf||а}, что от этой информации, корабля и его груза смердит убийствами, грабежом и бесчестием. Мне такое не интересно".

traits.locale_text: "Я бы сказал{mf||а}, что от этой информации, корабля и его груза смердит убийствами, грабежом и бесчестием. Мне такое не интересно".

languages.text: "I would say that the information, the ship, and the cargo reek of murder, plunder, and dishonour. I have no interest in such things."
languages.original_text: "Я бы сказал{mf||а}, что от этой информации, корабля и его груза смердит убийствами, грабежом и бесчестием. Мне такое не интересно".

traits.locale_text: "I would say that the information, the ship, and the cargo reek of murder, plunder, and ignobility. I have no interest in such things."
"I would say that the information, the ship, and the cargo reek of murder, plunder, and ignobility. I have no interest in such things."
"I would say that the information, the ship, and the cargo reek of murder, plunder, and dishonour. I have no interest in such things."
"I would say that the information, the ship, and the cargo reek of murder, plunder, and dishonour. I have no interest in such things."
"I would say that the information, the ship, and the cargo reek of murder, plunder, and dishonour. I have no interest in such things."

languages.text: « Je dirais que toute cette histoire empeste le meurtre, le pillage et le déshonneur ; aussi bien vos informations que le vaisseau et sa cargaison. Ça ne m'intéresse pas. »
languages.original_text: "I would say that the information, the ship, and the cargo reek of murder, plunder, and dishonour. I have no interest in such things."

traits.locale_text: « Je dirais que toute cette histoire empeste le meurtre, le pillage et le déshonneur ; aussi bien vos informations que le vaisseau et sa cargaison. Ça ne m'intéresse pas. »

languages.text: "Ich würde sagen, dass die Informationen, das Schiff und die Ladung nach Mord, Plünderung und Unehre stinken. Ich habe kein Interesse an solchen Dingen."
languages.original_text: "I would say that the information, the ship, and the cargo reek of murder, plunder, and dishonour. I have no interest in such things."

traits.locale_text: "Ich würde sagen, dass die Informationen, das Schiff und die Ladung nach Mord, Plünderung und Unehre stinken. Ich habe kein Interesse an solchen Dingen."

languages.text: "Diría que la información, el barco y la carga apestan a asesinato, saqueo y deshonor. No me interesan esas cosas".
languages.original_text: "I would say that the information, the ship, and the cargo reek of murder, plunder, and dishonour. I have no interest in such things."

traits.locale_text: "Diría que la información, el barco y la carga apestan a asesinato, saqueo y deshonor. No me interesan esas cosas".

languages.text: "Bilginin, geminin ve kargonun cinayet, yağma ve onursuzluk koktuğunu söyleyebilirim. Böyle şeylerle ilgilenmiyorum."
languages.original_text: "I would say that the information, the ship, and the cargo reek of murder, plunder, and dishonour. I have no interest in such things."

traits.locale_text: "Bilginin, geminin ve kargonun cinayet, yağma ve onursuzluk koktuğunu söyleyebilirim. Böyle şeylerle ilgilenmiyorum."
